Tracked Spreadsheet Fixtures
============================

This directory contains small, deterministic fixtures generated by
`scripts/generate-fixtures.py`. They are committed so a fresh checkout exercises
real spreadsheet containers and gives OSS-Fuzz a seed corpus without fetching
external data. Current tracked containers cover `.xls`, `.xlsx`, `.xlsb`, and
`.ods`.

`MANIFEST.json` records each fixture path, format, source/license, SHA-256 hash,
coverage tags, and small oracle counts for the public API surface, including
sheet views, tab colors, print options, and sparklines. Run
`cargo run --features full --bin rxls -- fixture-report tests/fixtures/MANIFEST.json --limit 50`
after changing generated fixtures to validate hashes, parser opens, coverage
tags, and oracle counts together.

The larger reference corpora stay under `local/` and are fetched on demand via
the parity scripts. Those files are not committed because of size and upstream
licensing constraints.
